articles.title: Mob sets panchayat neta’s house, vehicles ablaze in Shyampur
articles.description: Mob torches Howrah panchayat upa-pradhan’s home, SUV and bikes in Shyampur; wife doused in petrol but rescued by police; 10 held, tensions persist.

articles.title: India's Petrol Exports to 'Unknown' Markets Jump in June amid Russian Trade Buzz
articles.description: India’s petrol exports to ‘unknown’ markets surged 84% in June just as Russia battles fuel shortages from Ukrainian drone strikes. Explore how mysterious shipping routes, denials from New Delhi, and record Russian crude flows to India are reshaping global energy trade.

E20 ethanol row: Fresh claims question Centre's Supreme Court stand after 'experiment' denial
articles.description: The Attorney General's Office clarified that the June 30 hearing related to contractual provisions governing ethanol procurement by oil marketing companies from dedicated ethanol plants and not the merits of the Ethanol Blended Petrol Programme.

articles.title: BT Exclusive: India's first flex fuel car gives 11.8 kmpl. But that's not the biggest surprise
articles.description: Can an 85% ethanol-powered car feel just like a regular petrol vehicle? That's the question Business Today set out to answer after becoming one of the first news organisations in India to drive Maruti Suzuki's E85 flex-fuel Wagon R.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki Baleno Prices Hiked in India - Check Variant-Wise Rates Here
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki has recently increased prices for several Baleno variants with some seeing hikes of Rs 5,000 and others Rs 7,500, while the Sigma petrol manual remains unchanged at Rs 5.99 lakh. Check revised variant-wise prices here., Car News, Times Now

articles.title: India seeks to quell public backlash on ethanol-mixed fuel after 'experiment' remark
articles.description: India's government is facing a growing backlash over its mandatory E20 ethanol-blended petrol policy. Motorists are protesting lower fuel efficiency and vehicle performance issues, amplified by the Attorney General's recent description of the policy as an "experiment." While the government denies rushing the rollout and highlights environmental and economic benefits, public anger is mounting, with planned protests and widespread complaints on social media detailing car damage and increased costs.

articles.title: India seeks to quell public backlash on ethanol-mixed fuel after 'experiment' remark
articles.description: India's government on Friday ​sought to contain a growing backlash against its mandatory use of 20% ethanol-blended petrol, as consumers ‌unhappy about lower fuel efficiency and vehicle performance planned a protest against the policy.

articles.title: Russia halts petrol sales in city as Ukraine strikes deepen fuel crisis
articles.description: Ukrainian strikes on Russian energy infrastructure have triggered a severe fuel crisis, forcing curbs on sales and leading to price hikes. Cities like Novorossiysk have suspended gasoline sales to private motorists, while others see Cossacks deployed to manage queues and prevent conflict. Russia is now importing fuel and allowing lower-quality production to combat shortages.

articles.title: mongering claims': Govt trashes social media claims on harmful effects of E20 petrol
